g.title: cluster_inner
g.text: INNER LOOP — PROCESS_ITEMS + handle + classify (shared by all modes)

g.title: cluster_init
g.text: INIT (first PHASED run) — also called from SINGLE via ensure_pinned()

g.title: progress.md exists?->Read progress.md;\nhandle dirty tree;\nconfirm resume
